language-only.note: Dangerous capabilities absent from compile graph or denied at CLI gate. Not a sandbox.

experimental-full.note: Explicit opt-in build. Local commands allowlisted + injection-filtered + timeout; MATTER_ALLOW_LOCAL_COMMANDS=1 for non-allowlist. NOT a sandbox.

capabilities.language_only: absent — language_main has no Command spawn; capability_policy spawn paths unused
capabilities.experimental: present — allowlist + reject_injection + timeout + max output; structured argv (no PowerShell -Command)
capabilities.reach_via: experimental: agent-ui /run, agent tools, project scaffold validation

capabilities.experimental: removed raw PowerShell -Command path; structured argv only
capabilities.reach_via: n/a on language-only; experimental allowlist only

crates_functions: matter-stdlib file / fileio backends: fs::write, File::create
experimental agent tools: create/replace files in workspace
capabilities.language_only: present for language features (compile output, stdlib file) — intentional residual
absent — net feature off; backend not registered; CLI net-* denied
capabilities.experimental: present with feature net + agent curl helpers

crates_functions: bridges may invoke language package tools when polyglot enabled
capabilities.language_only: absent — polyglot feature off; package-install CLI denied
capabilities.experimental: possible via polyglot bridges when experimental-full

capabilities.language_only: absent — not linked; python3.dll not present

crates_functions: matter-backend ToolBackend (metadata stub — no OS spawn)
capabilities.language_only: CLI denied; agent backend not registered; ToolBackend is in-memory stub only
capabilities.experimental: present; /run uses whitelist; arbitrary needs MATTER_ALLOW_LOCAL_COMMANDS=1

crates_functions: callers in main.rs: agent-ui /run, terminal-snapshot, agent tools run, project scaffold check/run, git/cargo fix helpers
capabilities.language_only: not reachable — no callers in language_main; no PowerShell
capabilities.experimental: hardened: allowlist, injection reject, timeout, output cap, structured argv

env_controls_experimental.MATTER_ALLOW_LOCAL_COMMANDS: 1/true to allow non-allowlist commands that still pass injection filters
